title: Startup-Harness Skill Chains
description: Deterministic multi-phase skill flows enforced by hooks/skill-chain-enforcer.mjs. Each flow is triggered by a skill and gates Edit/Write on matching files until earlier phases' required skills have fired.

$schema.description: Relative or absolute URI of this schema. Editors use it for autocomplete + validation.

flows.description: Map of flow name -> Flow. The flow name is human-readable (e.g. website-end-to-end) and is reported in enforcer messages.

description.description: One-sentence summary of what this flow builds. Shown in CLI / docs.

trigger_skill.description: The skill whose invocation marks the start of this flow. skill-chain-enforcer treats the latest trigger_skill invocation across all flows as the active flow.

gate_patterns.description: Glob patterns (relative to cwd). When this flow is active and the Edit/Write target matches any pattern, earlier phases must be complete or the tool call is blocked.

phases.description: Ordered list of phases. Phase N is checked for completeness before any edit whose last phase-skill fired is at index >= N. The first phase with the trigger_skill is phase 0.

name.description: Human-readable phase name shown in enforcer messages (e.g. 'discovery', 'build', 'launch').

required.description: ALL of these skills must have fired before the phase is complete.

oneOf.description: AT LEAST ONE of these skills must have fired for the phase to be complete.

anyOf.description: At least `min` of the skills in `of` must have fired for the phase to be complete.
